name: Plex Media Server MCP
what_it_does: Plex Media Server MCP enabling AI agents to interact with Plex — the self-hosted media streaming platform — searching the media library, retrieving metadata, controlling playback on Plex clients, managing playlists, and integrating Plex's media catalog into agent-driven entertainment recommendation and home theater workflows.
use_cases: Searching Plex library for movies and TV shows from recommendation agents
Controlling Plex playback on active sessions from home assistant agents
Building AI-powered watch recommendations from entertainment agents
Querying media metadata and watched status from tracking agents
Creating and managing Plex playlists from curation agents
Monitoring Plex server health and active streams from management agents
not_for: Non-Plex media servers (Jellyfin, Emby have different MCPs)
Plex cloud/remote access without proper configuration
Teams without self-hosted Plex Media Server
best_when: A Plex user wants an AI home assistant that can search their media library, control playback, and make recommendations based on their viewing history.
avoid_when: You use Jellyfin or Emby instead of Plex, or don't self-host media.

auth.notes: Plex authentication token required. Get from Plex web app (X-Plex-Token). Plex server URL must be configured. Managed users may have restricted access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Plex: free for local streaming; remote access and features require Plex Pass
pricing.notes: Plex free tier works for local use. Plex Pass required for some features. Community MCP is free.

performance.rate_limits: Local Plex server — no external rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Plex auth token can expire — manual token renewal required
Plex remote access requires Plex Pass and port forwarding configuration
Playback control only works on active Plex sessions (someone watching)
Community MCP — Plex API is unofficial but relatively stable
Large libraries may have slow initial queries
Plex API version may change with major Plex Media Server updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Plex auth token. Local network by default. Community MCP. Token grants broad media library access.

security_score_components.security_notes: Plex token. Local network. Community MCP. Token provides media library access.
